content: InTheWake canonical ship validator is admin/validate-ship-page.sh (shell); admin/legacy/validate-ship-page.js is reference-only. Per-line behavior comes from admin/validator-config.json (main_id, grid_class, image_min/max/error_below). Dashboard baseline: audit-reports/ship-validation-dashboard.json via admin/aggregate-ship-validation.js. Byte-equal scanner: admin/scan-image-reuse.cjs (md5 -> image-reuse-registry.json). Perceptual scanner: admin/scan-image-recrops.cjs (dHash 9x8, Hamming <=8, needs sharp -> image-recrops-registry.json).
